channel.title: LLM Vendor Daily Digest
channel.description: Bilingual daily digests generated from vendor sources.

item.title: Daily Digest / 日报摘要 (2026-04-09)
item.description:
## English
### AWS * Explore where reinforcement fine-tuning (RFT) is most effective using the GSM8K dataset, and learn best practices for dataset preparation, reward function design, and hyperparameter tuning on Amazon Bedrock. [Link](https://aws.amazon.com/blogs/machine-learning/reinforcement-fine-tuning-on-amazon-bedrock-best-practices/) * Learn how to implement Amazon Nova Multimodal Embeddings to build a production-ready audio search system, including understanding audio embeddings and indexing/querying audio libraries. [Link](https://aws.amazon.com/blogs/machine-learning/building-intelligent-audio-search-with-amazon-nova-embeddings-a-deep-dive-into-semantic-audio-understanding/) * Discover four practical approaches to implementing human-in-the-loop (HITL) constructs for AI agents in healthcare and life sciences to ensure compliance with sensitive data regulations. [Link](https://aws.amazon.com/blogs/machine-learning/human-in-the-loop-constructs-for-agentic-workflows-in-healthcare-and-life-sciences/) * Walk through a complete implementation of fine-tuning Amazon Nova models on Amazon Bedrock using an intent classifier example to improve domain-specific task performance. [Link](https://aws.amazon.com/blogs/machine-learning/customize-amazon-nova-models-with-amazon-bedrock-fine-tuning/) * Learn how to build stateful MCP servers that request user input dynamically and stream progress updates for long-running tasks using Amazon Bedrock AgentCore Runtime. [Link](https://aws.amazon.com/blogs/machine-learning/introducing-stateful-mcp-client-capabilities-on-amazon-bedrock-agentcore-runtime/)
### Baidu * Baidu's enterprise-grade PP-OCRv5 API service is now open for public testing, offering up to 2,000 free test resources. [Link](https://ai.baidu.com/support/news?action=detail&id=3266)
### Hugging Face * Explore the capabilities of Sentence Transformers for multimodal embeddings and reranking models to enhance search and retrieval systems. [Link](https://huggingface.co/blog/multimodal-sentence-transformers)
### Microsoft * Read how LTM's Rajesh Kumar integrates Microsoft 365 Copilot into his workflow to enhance collaboration and productivity. [Link](https://news.microsoft.com/source/asia/features/from-prompts-to-partnership-how-ltms-rajesh-kumar-collaborates-with-microsoft-365-copilot/)
### OpenAI * Check the official terms and conditions for the OpenAI Full Fan Mode Contest, including eligibility, entry steps, and prize details for IPL match tickets. [Link](https://openai.com/index/full-fan-mode-contest-terms-conditions/)
***
## 中文
### AWS * 探索强化微调（RFT）在GSM8K数据集上的最佳应用场景，并学习在Amazon Bedrock上进行数据集准备、奖励函数设计和超参数调优的最佳实践。 [链接](https://aws.amazon.com/blogs/machine-learning/reinforcement-fine-tuning-on-amazon-bedrock-best-practices/) * 学习如何实现Amazon Nova多模态嵌入以构建生产就绪的音频搜索系统，包括理解音频嵌入以及索引/查询音频库。 [链接](https://aws.amazon.com/blogs/machine-learning/building-intelligent-audio-search-with-amazon-nova-embeddings-a-deep-dive-into-semantic-audio-understanding/) * 发现四种在医疗和生命科学领域为AI代理实施人机交互（HITL）结构以符合敏感数据法规的实际方法。 [链接](https://aws.amazon.com/blogs/machine-learning/human-in-the-loop-constructs-for-agentic-workflows-in-healthcare-and-life-sciences/) * 通过意图分类器示例，逐步完成在Amazon Bedrock上微调Amazon Nova模型的完整实现，以提高特定领域任务的性能。 [链接](https://aws.amazon.com/blogs/machine-learning/customize-amazon-nova-models-with-amazon-bedrock-fine-tuning/) * 学习如何使用Amazon Bedrock AgentCore Runtime构建有状态MCP服务器，以动态请求用户输入并为长时间运行的任务流式传输进度更新。 [链接](https://aws.amazon.com/blogs/machine-learning/introducing-stateful-mcp-client-capabilities-on-amazon-bedrock-agentcore-runtime/)
### 百度 * 百度的企业级PP-OCRv5 API服务现已开放公测，提供最高2000次免费测试资源。 [链接](https://ai.baidu.com/support/news?action=detail&id=3266)
### Hugging Face * 探索Sentence Transformers在多模态嵌入和重排序模型中的能力，以增强搜索和检索系统。 [链接](https://huggingface.co/blog/multimodal-sentence-transformers)
### Microsoft * 阅读LTM的Rajesh Kumar如何将Microsoft 365 Copilot集成到工作流程中，以增强协作和生产力。 [链接](https://news.microsoft.com/source/asia/features/from-prompts-to-partnership-how-ltms-rajesh-kumar-collaborates-with-microsoft-365-copilot/)
### OpenAI * 查看OpenAI Full Fan Mode竞赛的官方条款和条件，包括IPL比赛门票的资格、参赛步骤和奖品详情。 [链接](https://openai.com/index/full-fan-mode-contest-terms-conditions/)

item.title: Daily Digest / 日报摘要 (2026-04-08)
item.description:
# 2026-04-08
## English
### AWS * Learn how to build a natural text-to-SQL solution using Amazon Bedrock that transforms business questions into database queries and returns actionable answers. [Link](https://aws.amazon.com/blogs/machine-learning/text-to-sql-solution-powered-by-amazon-bedrock/) * This post demonstrates how to build an automated podcast generator featuring two AI hosts, highlighting streaming capabilities, stage-aware content filtering, and real-time audio generation. [Link](https://aws.amazon.com/blogs/machine-learning/building-real-time-conversational-podcasts-with-amazon-nova-2-sonic/) * Learn how to use Amazon Bedrock Projects to attribute inference costs to specific workloads and analyze them in AWS Cost Explorer and AWS Data Exports. [Link](https://aws.amazon.com/blogs/machine-learning/manage-ai-costs-with-amazon-bedrock-projects/)
### Hugging Face * Safetensors is joining the PyTorch Foundation. [Link](https://huggingface.co/blog/safetensors-joins-pytorch-foundation) * ALTK‑Evolve introduces on-the-job learning for AI agents. [Link](https://huggingface.co/blog/ibm-research/altk-evolve)
### OpenAI * Discover OpenAI’s Child Safety Blueprint, a roadmap for building AI responsibly with safeguards, age-appropriate design, and collaboration to protect young people online. [Link](https://openai.com/index/introducing-child-safety-blueprint)
## 中文
### AWS * 学习如何使用 Amazon Bedrock 构建自然语言转 SQL 解决方案，将业务问题转化为数据库查询并返回可操作的答案。 [链接](https://aws.amazon.com/blogs/machine-learning/text-to-sql-solution-powered-by-amazon-bedrock/) * 本文演示了如何构建一个由两名 AI 主持人参与的自动化播客生成器，展示了流式传输能力、阶段感知内容过滤和实时音频生成。 [链接](https://aws.amazon.com/blogs/machine-learning/building-real-time-conversational-podcasts-with-amazon-nova-2-sonic/) * 学习如何使用 Amazon Bedrock Projects 将推理成本归因于特定工作负载，并在 AWS Cost Explorer 和 AWS Data Exports 中进行分析。 [链接](https://aws.amazon.com/blogs/machine-learning/manage-ai-costs-with-amazon-bedrock-projects/)
### Hugging Face * Safetensors 正加入 PyTorch 基金会。 [链接](https://huggingface.co/blog/safetensors-joins-pytorch-foundation) * ALTK‑Evolve 为 AI 代理引入了在职学习功能。 [链接](https://huggingface.co/blog/ibm-research/altk-evolve)
### OpenAI * 发现 OpenAI 的儿童安全蓝图，这是一份关于负责任地构建 AI 的路线图，包含保障措施、适龄设计和协作机制，以保护并赋能在线的年轻人。 [链接](https://openai.com/index/introducing-child-safety-blueprint)

item.title: Daily Digest / 日报摘要 (2026-04-07)
item.description:
## English
### AWS Machine Learning Blog * Windward enhances alert investigation by combining geospatial intelligence with generative AI, allowing analysts to focus on decision-making. [Link](https://aws.amazon.com/blogs/machine-learning/from-isolated-alerts-to-contextual-intelligence-agentic-maritime-anomaly-analysis-with-generative-ai/) * This post demonstrates implementing a generative AI agentic assistant that uses both semantic and text-based search via Amazon Bedrock and Amazon OpenSearch. [Link](https://aws.amazon.com/blogs/machine-learning/building-intelligent-search-with-amazon-bedrock-and-amazon-opensearch-for-hybrid-rag-solutions/) * This post details fine-tuning Qwen 2.5 7B Instruct for tool calling using RLVR, including dataset preparation, reward function design, and deployment. [Link](https://aws.amazon.com/blogs/machine-learning/accelerate-agentic-tool-calling-with-serverless-model-customization-in-amazon-sagemaker-ai/) * This guide shows how to build a custom HR onboarding agent with Amazon Quick that understands organizational processes and automates tasks like answering questions. [Link](https://aws.amazon.com/blogs/machine-learning/build-ai-powered-employee-onboarding-agents-with-amazon-quick/)
### AWS News Blog (AI) * AWS announces the General Availability of the AWS DevOps Agent and Security Agent, along with product lifecycle updates and community news. [Link](https://aws.amazon.com/blogs/aws/aws-weekly-roundup-aws-devops-agent-security-agent-ga-product-lifecycle-updates-and-more-april-6-2026/)
## 中文
### AWS Machine Learning Blog * Windward 利用地理空间情报与生成式 AI 结合来增强告警调查，使分析师能够专注于决策。 [链接](https://aws.amazon.com/blogs/machine-learning/from-isolated-alerts-to-contextual-intelligence-agentic-maritime-anomaly-analysis-with-generative-ai/) * 本文演示了如何使用 Amazon Bedrock 和 Amazon OpenSearch 实现结合语义和基于文本搜索的生成式 AI 智能助手。 [链接](https://aws.amazon.com/blogs/machine-learning/building-intelligent-search-with-amazon-bedrock-and-amazon-opensearch-for-hybrid-rag-solutions/) * 本文详细介绍了如何使用 RLVR 对 Qwen 2.5 7B Instruct 进行微调以支持工具调用，包括数据集准备、奖励函数设计和部署。 [链接](https://aws.amazon.com/blogs/machine-learning/accelerate-agentic-tool-calling-with-serverless-model-customization-in-amazon-sagemaker-ai/) * 本指南展示了如何使用 Amazon Quick 构建自定义 HR 入职代理，使其理解组织流程并自动化回答问题等任务。 [链接](https://aws.amazon.com/blogs/machine-learning/build-ai-powered-employee-onboarding-agents-with-amazon-quick/)
### AWS News Blog (AI) * AWS 宣布 AWS DevOps Agent 和 Security Agent 正式发布，并附带产品生命周期更新和社区新闻。 [链接](https://aws.amazon.com/blogs/aws/aws-weekly-roundup-aws-devops-agent-security-agent-ga-product-lifecycle-updates-and-more-april-6-2026/)

item.title: Daily Digest / 日报摘要 (2026-04-06)
item.description:
## English
### AWS AWS details how to configure Amazon Bedrock AgentCore Gateway to connect to OAuth-protected MCP servers using the Authorization Code flow, providing a centralized layer for managing AI agent tool connections. [Link](https://aws.amazon.com/blogs/machine-learning/connecting-mcp-servers-to-amazon-bedrock-agentcore-gateway-using-authorization-code-flow/)
### OpenAI OpenAI outlines a people-first industrial policy for the AI era focused on expanding opportunity, sharing prosperity, and building resilient institutions as advanced intelligence evolves. [Link](https://openai.com/index/industrial-policy-for-the-intelligence-age/)
## 中文
### AWS AWS 介绍了如何使用授权码流程配置 Amazon Bedrock AgentCore Gateway 以连接受 OAuth 保护的 MCP 服务器，为管理 AI 代理的工具连接提供集中层。 [链接](https://aws.amazon.com/blogs/machine-learning/connecting-mcp-servers-to-amazon-bedrock-agentcore-gateway-using-authorization-code-flow/)
### OpenAI OpenAI 提出了面向 AI 时代以人为先的产业政策构想，重点在于扩大机会、分享繁荣并建立有韧性的机构，以适应先进智能的发展。 [链接](https://openai.com/index/industrial-policy-for-the-intelligence-age/)

item.title: Daily Digest / 日报摘要 (2026-04-04)
item.description:
## English ### AWS (2026-04-04) * Organizational safeguards are now generally available in Amazon Bedrock Guardrails, enabling centralized enforcement and management of safety controls across multiple AWS accounts within an AWS Organization. https://aws.amazon.com/blogs/aws/amazon-bedrock-guardrails-supports-cross-account-safeguards-with-centralized-control-and-management/
## 中文 ### AWS (2026-04-04) * Amazon Bedrock Guardrails 现已推出组织级防护功能，可在 AWS 组织内的多个 AWS 账户之间集中执行和管理安全控制。 https://aws.amazon.com/blogs/aws/amazon-bedrock-guardrails-supports-cross-account-safeguards-with-centralized-control-and-management/

item.title: Daily Digest / 日报摘要 (2026-04-03)
item.description:
## English
### AWS * Explore how ActorSimulator in Strands Evaluations SDK addresses the challenge of structured user simulation to integrate into your evaluation pipeline. [Link](https://aws.amazon.com/blogs/machine-learning/simulate-realistic-users-to-evaluate-multi-turn-ai-agents-in-strands-evals/)
### Google AI * Learn about new ways to balance cost and reliability in the Gemini API with Flex and Priority Inference. [Link](https://blog.google/innovation-and-ai/technology/developers-tools/introducing-flex-and-priority-inference/) * Create, edit, and share videos at no cost with the latest updates to Google Vids. [Link](https://blog.google/products-and-platforms/products/workspace/google-vids-updates-lyria-veo/)
### Google DeepMind * Gemma 4 is our most intelligent open models to date, purpose-built for advanced reasoning and agentic workflows. [Link](https://deepmind.google/blog/gemma-4-byte-for-byte-the-most-capable-open-models/)
### Together AI * Wan 2.7, a four-model video suite for generation, continuation, and editing, is now available on Together AI. [Link](https://www.together.ai/blog/wan-2-7-now-available-on-together-ai) * New research shows LLMs can optimize database query execution plans, achieving up to 4.78x speedups by correcting cardinality estimation errors. [Link](https://www.together.ai/blog/using-llms-to-optimize-database-query-execution)
---
## 中文
### AWS * 探索 Strands Evaluations SDK 中的 ActorSimulator 如何解决结构化用户模拟的挑战，以便将其集成到您的评估流程中。 [链接](https://aws.amazon.com/blogs/machine-learning/simulate-realistic-users-to-evaluate-multi-turn-ai-agents-in-strands-evals/)
### Google AI * 了解 Gemini API 中通过 Flex 和 Priority Inference 平衡成本与可靠性的新方法。 [链接](https://blog.google/innovation-and-ai/technology/developers-tools/introducing-flex-and-priority-inference/) * 利用 Google Vids 的最新更新，免费创建、编辑和分享视频。 [链接](https://blog.google/products-and-platforms/products/workspace/google-vids-updates-lyria-veo/)
### Google DeepMind * Gemma 4 是我们迄今为止最智能的开源模型，专为高级推理和代理工作流而设计。 [链接](https://deepmind.google/blog/gemma-4-byte-for-byte-the-most-capable-open-models/)
### Together AI * Wan 2.7，一个用于生成、续写和编辑的四模型视频套件，现已上线 Together AI。 [链接](https://www.together.ai/blog/wan-2-7-now-available-on-together-ai) * 新研究表明 LLM 可以优化数据库查询执行计划，通过修正基数估计错误，实现高达 4.78 倍的加速。 [链接](https://www.together.ai/blog/using-llms-to-optimize-database-query-execution)

item.title: Daily Digest / 日报摘要 (2026-04-02)
item.description:
## English
### AWS Machine Learning Blog * This post demonstrates how to build an automated competitive price intelligence system that streamlines manual workflows, supporting teams to make data-driven pricing decisions with real-time market insights. | https://aws.amazon.com/blogs/machine-learning/automating-competitive-price-intelligence-with-amazon-nova-act/ * This post explains how to use managed session storage to persist an agent's filesystem state and execute shell commands directly within the agent's environment. | https://aws.amazon.com/blogs/machine-learning/persist-session-state-with-filesystem-configuration-and-execute-shell-commands/ * Partnering with the AWS Generative AI Innovation Center, Rocket Close developed an intelligent document processing solution using Amazon Textract and Bedrock, reducing processing time by 15 times and achieving 90% accuracy. | https://aws.amazon.com/blogs/machine-learning/rocket-close-transforms-mortgage-document-processing-with-amazon-bedrock-and-amazon-textract/ * This post demonstrates how to configure AWS Network Firewall to restrict AgentCore resources to an allowlist of approved internet domains using SNI inspection. | https://aws.amazon.com/blogs/machine-learning/control-which-domains-your-ai-agents-can-access/ * This post details how TGS achieved near-linear scaling for distributed training and expanded context windows for their Vision Transformer-based SFM using Amazon SageMaker HyperPod, cutting training time from 6 months to 5 days. | https://aws.amazon.com/blogs/machine-learning/scaling-seismic-foundation-models-on-aws-distributed-training-with-amazon-sagemaker-hyperpod-and-expanding-context-windows/
### Hugging Face Blog * This post introduces Holo3, a new development in the computer use frontier. | https://huggingface.co/blog/Hcompany/holo3 * This post welcomes Gemma 4, a frontier multimodal intelligence model designed for on-device deployment. | https://huggingface.co/blog/gemma4
### OpenAI * Codex now includes pay-as-you-go pricing for ChatGPT Business and Enterprise, providing teams a more flexible option to start and scale adoption. | https://openai.com/index/codex-flexible-pricing-for-teams * OpenAI acquires TBPN to accelerate global conversations around AI and support independent media, expanding dialogue with builders and businesses. | https://openai.com/index/openai-acquires-tbpn
## 中文
### AWS Machine Learning Blog * 本文演示了如何构建自动化的竞争价格情报系统，以简化手动工作流程，支持团队利用实时市场洞察做出数据驱动的定价决策。 | https://aws.amazon.com/blogs/machine-learning/automating-competitive-price-intelligence-with-amazon-nova-act/ * 本文介绍了如何使用托管会话存储来持久化代理的文件系统状态，并在代理环境中直接执行 shell 命令。 | https://aws.amazon.com/blogs/machine-learning/persist-session-state-with-filesystem-configuration-and-execute-shell-commands/ * 在 AWS 生成式 AI 创新中心的战略合作伙伴关系下，Rocket Close 开发了一种使用 Amazon Textract 和 Bedrock 的智能文档处理解决方案，将处理时间缩短了 15 倍，并实现了 90% 的准确率。 | https://aws.amazon.com/blogs/machine-learning/rocket-close-transforms-mortgage-document-processing-with-amazon-bedrock-and-amazon-textract/ * 本文演示了如何配置 AWS Network Firewall，利用 SNI 检查将 AgentCore 资源限制为已批准的互联网域名白名单。 | https://aws.amazon.com/blogs/machine-learning/control-which-domains-your-ai-agents-can-access/ * 本文详细介绍了 TGS 如何使用 Amazon SageMaker HyperPod 实现分布式训练的近线性扩展，并为基于 Vision Transformer 的地震基础模型扩展了上下文窗口，将训练时间从 6 个月缩短至 5 天。 | https://aws.amazon.com/blogs/machine-learning/scaling-seismic-foundation-models-on-aws-distributed-training-with-amazon-sagemaker-hyperpod-and-expanding-context-windows/
### Hugging Face Blog * 本文介绍了 Holo3，这是计算机使用领域的一项新突破。 | https://huggingface.co/blog/Hcompany/holo3 * 本文欢迎 Gemma 4，这是一款专为设备端部署设计的前沿多模态智能模型。 | https://huggingface.co/blog/gemma4
### OpenAI * Codex 现在为 ChatGPT Business 和 Enterprise 提供按需付费选项，为团队提供了更灵活的启动和扩展采用方式。 | https://openai.com/index/codex-flexible-pricing-for-teams * OpenAI 收购 TBPN 以加速全球关于 AI 的对话并支持独立媒体，从而扩大与构建者、企业和更广泛科技社区的对话。 | https://openai.com/index/openai-acquires-tbpn

item.title: Daily Digest / 日报摘要 (2026-04-01)
item.description:
## English ### AWS Machine Learning Blog - [AWS launches frontier agents for security testing and cloud operations](https://aws.amazon.com/blogs/machine-learning/aws-launches-frontier-agents-for-security-testing-and-cloud-operations/) (2026-04-01 00:25) - I'm excited to announce that AWS Security Agent on-demand penetration testing and AWS DevOps Agent are now generally available, representing a new class of AI capabilities we announced at re:Invent called frontier agents. These autonomou... - [Accelerating software delivery with agentic QA automation using Amazon Nova Act](https://aws.amazon.com/blogs/machine-learning/accelerating-software-delivery-with-agentic-qa-automation-using-amazon-nova-act/) (2026-04-01 01:46) - In this post, we demonstrate how to implement agentic QA automation through QA Studio, a reference solution built with Amazon Nova Act. You will see how to define tests in natural language that adapt automatically to UI changes, explore... - [Building an AI powered system for compliance evidence collection](https://aws.amazon.com/blogs/machine-learning/building-an-ai-powered-system-for-compliance-evidence-collection/) (2026-04-01 01:52) - In this post, we show you how to build a similar system for your organization. You will learn the architecture decisions, implementation details, and deployment process that can help you automate your own compliance workflows. - [Build a FinOps agent using Amazon Bedrock AgentCore](https://aws.amazon.com/blogs/machine-learning/build-a-finops-agent-using-amazon-bedrock-agentcore/) (2026-04-01 01:57) - In this post, you learn how to build a FinOps agent using&nbsp;Amazon Bedrock AgentCore that helps your finance team manage AWS costs across multiple accounts. This conversational agent consolidates data from&nbsp;AWS Cost Explorer,&nbsp... - [Build reliable AI agents with Amazon Bedrock AgentCore Evaluations](https://aws.amazon.com/blogs/machine-learning/build-reliable-ai-agents-with-amazon-bedrock-agentcore-evaluations/) (2026-04-01 06:11) - In this post, we introduce Amazon Bedrock AgentCore Evaluations, a fully managed service for assessing AI agent performance across the development lifecycle. We walk through how the service measures agent accuracy across multiple quality...
### Google AI Blog - [Build with Veo 3.1 Lite, our most cost-effective video generation model](https://blog.google/innovation-and-ai/technology/ai/veo-3-1-lite/) (2026-04-01 00:00) - Build with Veo 3.1 Lite - [The latest AI news we announced in March 2026](https://blog.google/innovation-and-ai/technology/ai/google-ai-updates-march-2026/) (2026-04-01 21:00) - March 2026 AI Recap showing new updates - [We’re creating a new satellite imagery map to help protect Brazil’s forests.](https://blog.google/products-and-platforms/products/earth/satellite-imagery-brazilian-deforestation/) (2026-04-01 21:30) - Google partnered with the Brazilian government on a satellite imagery map to help protect the country’s forests.
### Hugging Face Blog - [Falcon Perception](https://huggingface.co/blog/tiiuae/falcon-perception) (2026-04-01 15:13)

## 中文 ### AWS Machine Learning Blog - [AWS launches frontier agents for security testing and cloud operations](https://aws.amazon.com/blogs/machine-learning/aws-launches-frontier-agents-for-security-testing-and-cloud-operations/) (2026-04-01 00:25) - I'm excited to announce that AWS Security Agent on-demand penetration testing and AWS DevOps Agent are now generally available, representing a new class of AI capabilities we announced at re:Invent called frontier agents. These autonomou... - [Accelerating software delivery with agentic QA automation using Amazon Nova Act](https://aws.amazon.com/blogs/machine-learning/accelerating-software-delivery-with-agentic-qa-automation-using-amazon-nova-act/) (2026-04-01 01:46) - In this post, we demonstrate how to implement agentic QA automation through QA Studio, a reference solution built with Amazon Nova Act. You will see how to define tests in natural language that adapt automatically to UI changes, explore... - [Building an AI powered system for compliance evidence collection](https://aws.amazon.com/blogs/machine-learning/building-an-ai-powered-system-for-compliance-evidence-collection/) (2026-04-01 01:52) - In this post, we show you how to build a similar system for your organization. You will learn the architecture decisions, implementation details, and deployment process that can help you automate your own compliance workflows. - [Build a FinOps agent using Amazon Bedrock AgentCore](https://aws.amazon.com/blogs/machine-learning/build-a-finops-agent-using-amazon-bedrock-agentcore/) (2026-04-01 01:57) - In this post, you learn how to build a FinOps agent using&nbsp;Amazon Bedrock AgentCore that helps your finance team manage AWS costs across multiple accounts. This conversational agent consolidates data from&nbsp;AWS Cost Explorer,&nbsp... - [Build reliable AI agents with Amazon Bedrock AgentCore Evaluations](https://aws.amazon.com/blogs/machine-learning/build-reliable-ai-agents-with-amazon-bedrock-agentcore-evaluations/) (2026-04-01 06:11) - In this post, we introduce Amazon Bedrock AgentCore Evaluations, a fully managed service for assessing AI agent performance across the development lifecycle. We walk through how the service measures agent accuracy across multiple quality...
### Google AI Blog - [Build with Veo 3.1 Lite, our most cost-effective video generation model](https://blog.google/innovation-and-ai/technology/ai/veo-3-1-lite/) (2026-04-01 00:00) - Build with Veo 3.1 Lite - [The latest AI news we announced in March 2026](https://blog.google/innovation-and-ai/technology/ai/google-ai-updates-march-2026/) (2026-04-01 21:00) - March 2026 AI Recap showing new updates - [We’re creating a new satellite imagery map to help protect Brazil’s forests.](https://blog.google/products-and-platforms/products/earth/satellite-imagery-brazilian-deforestation/) (2026-04-01 21:30) - Google partnered with the Brazilian government on a satellite imagery map to help protect the country’s forests.

item.title: Daily Digest / 日报摘要 (2026-03-31)
item.description:
## English
### AWS AWS introduces AI Risk Intelligence (AIRI) to help enterprises govern agents at scale, addressing the dynamic interactions of agentic workloads. [Link](https://aws.amazon.com/blogs/machine-learning/can-your-governance-keep-pace-with-your-ai-ambitions-ai-risk-intelligence-in-the-agentic-era/)
### Hugging Face Hugging Face releases TRL v1.0, a post-training library designed to evolve alongside the field's advancements. [Link](https://huggingface.co/blog/trl-v1)
### Hugging Face Hugging Face introduces the Granite 4.0 3B Vision model, offering compact multimodal intelligence tailored for enterprise document processing. [Link](https://huggingface.co/blog/ibm-granite/granite-4-vision)
### Zhipu AI Zhipu AI releases its first performance report, marking a significant step in exploring the upper limits of AGI. [Link](https://www.zhipuai.cn/zh/news/152)
## 中文
### AWS AWS 发布 AI Risk Intelligence (AIRI)，旨在帮助企业在规模化治理智能体时应对智能体工作负载的动态交互。 [链接](https://aws.amazon.com/blogs/machine-learning/can-your-governance-keep-pace-with-your-ai-ambitions-ai-risk-intelligence-in-the-agentic-era/)
### Hugging Face Hugging Face 发布 TRL v1.0，这是一个旨在跟随领域发展而进化的后训练库。 [链接](https://huggingface.co/blog/trl-v1)
### Hugging Face Hugging Face 推出 Granite 4.0 3B Vision 模型，为企业文档处理提供紧凑的多模态智能。 [链接](https://huggingface.co/blog/ibm-granite/granite-4-vision)
### 智谱 AI 智谱 AI 发布首份业绩报告，标志着其在探索 AGI 智能上界方面迈出了重要一步。 [链接](https://www.zhipuai.cn/zh/news/152)

item.title: Daily Digest / 日报摘要 (2026-03-30)
item.description:
## English
### AWS Machine Learning Blog * Walk through use cases for enhancing viewer experiences using Strands Agents SDK, Amazon Bedrock AgentCore, and Amazon Nova Sonic 2.0 to create a personal entertainment concierge. | https://aws.amazon.com/blogs/machine-learning/deliver-hyper-personalized-viewer-experiences-with-an-agentic-ai-movie-assistant-using-amazon-bedrock-agentcore-and-amazon-nova-sonic-2-0/ * Learn how to build and deploy a deep learning model for detecting solar flares using ESA STIX data on Amazon SageMaker AI. | https://aws.amazon.com/blogs/machine-learning/build-a-solar-flare-detection-system-on-sagemaker-ai-lstm-networks-and-esa-stix-data/ * Explore how to build a generative AI solution that generates photorealistic vehicle images and enforces brand guideline compliance across ten brands. | https://aws.amazon.com/blogs/machine-learning/reimagine-marketing-at-volkswagen-group-with-generative-ai/ * Learn how Ring scales global customer support using metadata-driven filtering and separated content management workflows with Amazon Bedrock Knowledge Bases. | https://aws.amazon.com/blogs/machine-learning/how-ring-scales-global-customer-support-with-amazon-bedrock-knowledge-bases/
### OpenAI * OpenAI hosts a workshop with the Gates Foundation to help disaster response teams in Asia turn AI into action. | https://openai.com/index/helping-disaster-response-teams-asia
## 中文
### AWS Machine Learning Blog * 介绍如何使用 Strands Agents SDK、Amazon Bedrock AgentCore 和 Amazon Nova Sonic 2.0 创建个性化娱乐顾问，以增强用户观看体验。 | https://aws.amazon.com/blogs/machine-learning/deliver-hyper-personalized-viewer-experiences-with-an-agentic-ai-movie-assistant-using-amazon-bedrock-agentcore-and-amazon-nova-sonic-2-0/ * 学习如何使用 Amazon SageMaker AI 和 ESA STIX 数据构建并部署用于检测太阳耀斑的深度学习模型。 | https://aws.amazon.com/blogs/machine-learning/build-a-solar-flare-detection-system-on-sagemaker-ai-lstm-networks-and-esa-stix-data/ * 探讨如何构建生成式 AI 解决方案，用于生成逼真的车辆图像并确保十个品牌符合品牌指南合规性。 | https://aws.amazon.com/blogs/machine-learning/reimagine-marketing-at-volkswagen-group-with-generative-ai/ * 了解 Ring 如何利用元数据驱动的过滤和分离的内容管理工作流，使用 Amazon Bedrock Knowledge Bases 扩展全球客户支持并节省成本。 | https://aws.amazon.com/blogs/machine-learning/how-ring-scales-global-customer-support-with-amazon-bedrock-knowledge-bases/
### OpenAI * OpenAI 与盖茨基金会合作举办研讨会，帮助亚洲地区的灾害响应团队将 AI 转化为实际行动。 | https://openai.com/index/helping-disaster-response-teams-asia
### 智谱 * 智谱宣布将于 2026 年 3 月 31 日公布截至 2025 年 12 月 31 日止年度的全年业绩。 | https://www.zhipuai.cn/zh/news/151

item.title: Daily Digest / 日报摘要 (2026-03-27)
item.description:
## English
### AWS Machine Learning Blog * Announcing the new Bidirectional Streaming API for Amazon Polly, enabling real-time text-to-speech synthesis where audio can start streaming before the full text is available, ideal for conversational AI and LLMs. [Link](https://aws.amazon.com/blogs/machine-learning/introducing-amazon-polly-bidirectional-streaming-real-time-speech-synthesis-for-conversational-ai/) * Demonstrates how to integrate Amazon S3 general purpose buckets with Amazon SageMaker Catalog to fine-tune Llama 3.2 11B Vision Instruct for visual question answering using SageMaker Unified Studio. [Link](https://aws.amazon.com/blogs/machine-learning/accelerating-llm-fine-tuning-with-unstructured-data-using-sagemaker-unified-studio-and-s3/) * Walks through building a serverless, context-aware AI solution using Amazon Bedrock Guardrails to ensure responsible AI deployment and compliance for vulnerable populations. [Link](https://aws.amazon.com/blogs/machine-learning/building-age-responsive-context-aware-ai-with-amazon-bedrock-guardrails/) * Amazon Bedrock is now available in the Asia Pacific (New Zealand) Region (ap-southeast-6), allowing customers to access Anthropic Claude and Amazon Nova models directly with cross-region inference capabilities. [Link](https://aws.amazon.com/blogs/machine-learning/run-generative-ai-inference-with-amazon-bedrock-in-asia-pacific-new-zealand/)
### Google AI Blog * Google Translate’s Live translate with headphones is officially launching on iOS, expanding the feature to more countries for both iOS and Android users. [Link](https://blog.google/products-and-platforms/products/translate/live-translate-with-headphones/) * James Manyika discusses AI and creativity with LL COOL J in the latest episode of the Dialogues on Technology and Society series. [Link](https://blog.google/innovation-and-ai/technology/ai/ll-cool-j-dialogues/)
### Hugging Face Blog * Announcing the release of OpenClaw, a new open-source project. [Link](https://huggingface.co/blog/liberate-your-openclaw)
***
## 中文
### AWS Machine Learning Blog * 宣布 Amazon Polly 双向流式 API，允许在文本完全可用之前就开始流式传输音频，非常适合对话式 AI 和大语言模型。 [链接](https://aws.amazon.com/blogs/machine-learning/introducing-amazon-polly-bidirectional-streaming-real-time-speech-synthesis-for-conversational-ai/) * 演示了如何将 Amazon S3 通用存储桶与 SageMaker Catalog 集成，以使用 SageMaker Unified Studio 微调 Llama 3.2 11B Vision Instruct 模型进行视觉问答。 [链接](https://aws.amazon.com/blogs/machine-learning/accelerating-llm-fine-tuning-with-unstructured-data-using-sagemaker-unified-studio-and-s3/) * 演示了如何使用 Amazon Bedrock Guardrails 构建无服务器、上下文感知的 AI 解决方案，以确保负责任的 AI 部署并符合弱势群体的合规要求。 [链接](https://aws.amazon.com/blogs/machine-learning/building-age-responsive-context-aware-ai-with-amazon-bedrock-guardrails/) * Amazon Bedrock 现已在亚太（新西兰）区域（ap-southeast-6）上线，客户可以直接使用跨区域推理功能访问 Anthropic Claude 和 Amazon Nova 模型。 [链接](https://aws.amazon.com/blogs/machine-learning/run-generative-ai-inference-with-amazon-bedrock-in-asia-pacific-new-zealand/)
### Google AI Blog * Google Translate 的耳机实时翻译功能正式登陆 iOS，并将该功能扩展到更多国家/地区，供 iOS 和 Android 用户使用。 [链接](https://blog.google/products-and-platforms/products/translate/live-translate-with-headphones/) * James Manyika 在“技术与社会对话”系列最新一集中与 LL COOL J 探讨了 AI 与创造力。 [链接](https://blog.google/innovation-and-ai/technology/ai/ll-cool-j-dialogues/)
### Hugging Face Blog * 宣布 OpenClaw 的发布，这是一个新的开源项目。 [链接](https://huggingface.co/blog/liberate-your-openclaw)

item.title: Daily Digest / 日报摘要 (2026-03-26)
item.description:
## English
### AWS Machine Learning Blog * Walks through the end-to-end workflow of using reinforcement fine-tuning (RFT) on Amazon Bedrock with OpenAI-compatible APIs, covering authentication setup, Lambda-based reward functions, and inference. [Link](https://aws.amazon.com/blogs/machine-learning/reinforcement-fine-tuning-on-amazon-bedrock-with-openai-compatible-apis-a-technical-walkthrough/) * Learn how to deploy Pipecat voice agents on Amazon Bedrock AgentCore Runtime using different network transport approaches like WebSockets and WebRTC, with practical guidance and code samples. [Link](https://aws.amazon.com/blogs/machine-learning/deploy-voice-agents-with-pipecat-and-amazon-bedrock-agentcore-runtime-part-1/) * Explores how Amazon Bedrock's multimodal foundation models enable scalable video understanding through three distinct architectural approaches designed for various use cases. [Link](https://aws.amazon.com/blogs/machine-learning/unlocking-video-insights-at-scale-with-amazon-bedrock-multimodal-models/)
### Google AI Blog * Teaser for Lyria 3, Google's newest music generation model. [Link](https://blog.google/innovation-and-ai/technology/developers-tools/lyria-3-developers/) * Highlights new capabilities of Lyria 3 Pro through a promotional video, enabling longer track creation across more Google products. [Link](https://blog.google/innovation-and-ai/technology/ai/lyria-3-pro/) * Announces the global expansion of Search Live, allowing users to search for information about their surroundings using their camera. [Link](https://blog.google/products-and-platforms/products/search/search-live-global-expansion/) * Introduces Gemini 3.1 Flash Live, a model designed to make audio AI interactions more natural, reliable, and fluid. [Link](https://blog.google/innovation-and-ai/models-and-research/gemini-models/gemini-3-1-flash-live/)
### Google DeepMind (Blog) * Introduces Lyria 3 Pro, which unlocks longer tracks with structural awareness and brings Lyria to more Google products and surfaces. [Link](https://deepmind.google/blog/lyria-3-pro-create-longer-tracks-in-more/) * Discusses Google DeepMind's research into AI's harmful manipulation risks in areas like finance and health, leading to new safety measures. [Link](https://deepmind.google/blog/protecting-people-from-harmful-manipulation/) * Highlights the latest voice model with improved precision and lower latency to make voice interactions more fluid, natural, and precise. [Link](https://deepmind.google/blog/gemini-3-1-flash-live-making-audio-ai-more-natural-and-reliable/)
***
## 中文
### AWS Machine Learning Blog * 演示了如何在 Amazon Bedrock 上使用 OpenAI 兼容 API 进行强化微调（RFT）的端到端工作流程，涵盖身份验证设置、基于 Lambda 的奖励函数部署以及推理。 [链接](https://aws.amazon.com/blogs/machine-learning/reinforcement-fine-tuning-on-amazon-bedrock-with-openai-compatible-apis-a-technical-walkthrough/) * 学习如何使用不同的网络传输方式（如 WebSockets 和 WebRTC）在 Amazon Bedrock AgentCore Runtime 上部署 Pipecat 语音代理，并提供实用的部署指导和代码示例。 [链接](https://aws.amazon.com/blogs/machine-learning/deploy-voice-agents-with-pipecat-and-amazon-bedrock-agentcore-runtime-part-1/) * 探讨了 Amazon Bedrock 的多模态基础模型如何通过三种不同的架构方法实现可扩展的视频理解，每种方法针对不同的用例和成本性能权衡。 [链接](https://aws.amazon.com/blogs/machine-learning/unlocking-video-insights-at-scale-with-amazon-bedrock-multimodal-models/)
### Google AI Blog * Google 最新音乐生成模型 Lyria 3 的预告。 [链接](https://blog.google/innovation-and-ai/technology/developers-tools/lyria-3-developers/) * 通过宣传视频展示了 Lyria 3 Pro 的新功能，使其能够在更多 Google 产品中创建更长的曲目。 [链接](https://blog.google/innovation-and-ai/technology/ai/lyria-3-pro/) * 宣布 Search Live 的全球扩展，允许用户使用摄像头搜索周围环境的信息。 [链接](https://blog.google/products-and-platforms/products/search/search-live-global-expansion/) * 介绍了 Gemini 3.1 Flash Live，该模型旨在使音频 AI 交互更加自然、可靠和流畅。 [链接](https://blog.google/innovation-and-ai/models-and-research/gemini-models/gemini-3-1-flash-live/)
### Google DeepMind (Blog) * 介绍了 Lyria 3 Pro，它解锁了具有结构感知能力的更长时间曲目，并将 Lyria 带到了更多 Google 产品和界面中。 [链接](https://deepmind.google/blog/lyria-3-pro-create-longer-tracks-in-more/) * 讨论了 Google DeepMind 在金融和健康等领域对 AI 有害操纵风险的研究，并由此产生了新的安全措施。 [链接](https://deepmind.google/blog/protecting-people-from-harmful-manipulation/) * 强调了最新的语音模型，该模型具有更高的精度和更低的延迟，使语音交互更加流畅、自然和精确。 [链接](https://deepmind.google/blog/gemini-3-1-flash-live-making-audio-ai-more-natural-and-reliable/)

item.title: Daily Digest / 日报摘要 (2026-03-25)
item.description:
## English
### AWS * AWS introduces Claude Tool use in Amazon Bedrock to perform dynamic, adaptable entity recognition without extensive setup or training. [Link](https://aws.amazon.com/blogs/machine-learning/accelerating-custom-entity-recognition-with-claude-tool-use-in-amazon-bedrock/) * This post details how to search for p-family GPU capacity, create a training plan reservation for inference, and deploy a SageMaker AI endpoint on that reserved capacity. [Link](https://aws.amazon.com/blogs/machine-learning/deploy-sagemaker-ai-inference-endpoints-with-set-gpu-capacity-using-training-plans/)
### Microsoft * Infobip’s Veselin Vuković discusses how Microsoft 365 Copilot helps nurture partnerships and streamline business operations. [Link](https://news.microsoft.com/source/emea/features/infobip-microsoft-365-copilot-to-nurture-partnerships/) * KPMG Canada’s Christine Andrew explains how Copilot goes beyond saving time to unlock high-value impact in her work. [Link](https://news.microsoft.com/source/canada/features/ai/copilot-in-the-c-suite-christine-andrew-kpmg/)
## 中文
### AWS * AWS 在 Amazon Bedrock 中引入了 Claude Tool use，无需大量设置或训练即可执行动态、适应性强的实体识别。 [链接](https://aws.amazon.com/blogs/machine-learning/accelerating-custom-entity-recognition-with-claude-tool-use-in-amazon-bedrock/) * 本文介绍了如何搜索 p 系列 GPU 容量，为推理创建训练计划预留，并在该预留容量上部署 SageMaker AI 端点。 [链接](https://aws.amazon.com/blogs/machine-learning/deploy-sagemaker-ai-inference-endpoints-with-set-gpu-capacity-using-training-plans/)
### Microsoft * Infobip 的 Veselin Vuković 讨论了 Microsoft 365 Copilot 如何帮助培育合作伙伴关系并简化业务运营。 [链接](https://news.microsoft.com/source/emea/features/infobip-microsoft-365-copilot-to-nurture-partnerships/) * KPMG Canada 的 Christine Andrew 解释了 Copilot 如何超越节省时间的范畴，为她的工作带来高价值影响。 [链接](https://news.microsoft.com/source/canada/features/ai/copilot-in-the-c-suite-christine-andrew-kpmg/)

## English ### AWS Machine Learning Blog - [P-EAGLE: Faster LLM inference with Parallel Speculative Decoding in vLLM](https://aws.amazon.com/blogs/machine-learning/p-eagle-faster-llm-inference-with-parallel-speculative-decoding-in-vllm/) (2026-03-14 03:27) - In this post, we explain how P-EAGLE works, how we integrated it into vLLM starting from v0.16.0 (PR#32887), and how to serve it with our pre-trained checkpoints.
### Hugging Face Blog - [Beyond Semantic Similarity: Introducing NVIDIA NeMo Retriever’s Generalizable Agentic Retrieval Pipeline](https://huggingface.co/blog/nvidia/nemo-retriever-agentic-retrieval) (2026-03-14 04:00)

### Hugging Face Blog - [Beyond Semantic Similarity: Introducing NVIDIA NeMo Retriever’s Generalizable Agentic Retrieval Pipeline](https://huggingface.co/blog/nvidia/nemo-retriever-agentic-retrieval) (2026-03-14 04:00)

item.title: Daily Digest / 日报摘要 (2026-03-11)
item.description:
## English ### Anthropic (Newsroom) - [Introducing The Anthropic Institute](https://www.anthropic.com/news/the-anthropic-institute) (2026-03-11 00:00)
### Hugging Face Blog - [Code Concepts: A Large-Scale Synthetic Dataset Generated from Programming Concept Seeds](https://huggingface.co/blog/nvidia/synthetic-code-concepts) (2026-03-11 15:50)
### OpenAI - [From model to agent: Equipping the Responses API with a computer environment](https://openai.com/index/equip-responses-api-computer-environment) (2026-03-11 11:00) - How OpenAI built an agent runtime using the Responses API, shell tool, and hosted containers to run secure, scalable agents with files, tools, and state. - [Wayfair boosts catalog accuracy and support speed with OpenAI](https://openai.com/index/wayfair) (2026-03-11 11:00) - Wayfair uses OpenAI models to improve ecommerce support and product catalog accuracy, automating ticket triage and enhancing millions of product attributes at scale. - [Designing AI agents to resist prompt injection](https://openai.com/index/designing-agents-to-resist-prompt-injection) (2026-03-11 11:30) - How ChatGPT defends against prompt injection and social engineering by constraining risky actions and protecting sensitive data in agent workflows. - [Rakuten fixes issues twice as fast with Codex](https://openai.com/index/rakuten) (2026-03-11 13:00) - Rakuten uses Codex, the coding agent from OpenAI, to ship software faster and safer, reducing MTTR 50%, automating CI/CD reviews, and delivering full-stack builds in weeks.
### Together AI Blog - [Together AI Brings NVIDIA Nemotron 3 to Developers on Day 0](https://www.together.ai/blog/nvidia-nemotron-3-super) (2026-03-11 00:00) - NVIDIA Nemotron 3 Super is now available on Together AI Dedicated Inference, delivering efficient multi-agent reasoning, a 1M-token context window, and production-grade deployment on managed infrastructure.
## 中文 ### Anthropic (Newsroom) - [Introducing The Anthropic Institute](https://www.anthropic.com/news/the-anthropic-institute) (2026-03-11 00:00)

item.title: Daily Digest / 日报摘要 (2026-03-10)
item.description:
## English
### Anthropic * Anthropic will open its fourth office in the Asia-Pacific region in Sydney. | https://www.anthropic.com/news/sydney-fourth-office-asia-pacific
### Google AI * Gemini in Google Sheets has achieved state-of-the-art performance with new beta features for creating and analyzing complex data. | https://blog.google/products-and-platforms/products/workspace/gemini-google-sheets-state-of-the-art/
### Hugging Face * Hugging Face introduces Storage Buckets on the Hub to help developers manage large datasets and models more efficiently. | https://huggingface.co/blog/storage-buckets * This post explores lessons learned from 16 open-source reinforcement learning libraries to optimize token usage. | https://huggingface.co/blog/async-rl-training-landscape * Hugging Face details how NVIDIA builds open data pipelines to accelerate AI model training. | https://huggingface.co/blog/nvidia/open-data-for-ai
### OpenAI * ChatGPT now offers interactive visual explanations for math and science, helping students explore concepts in real time. | https://openai.com/index/new-ways-to-learn-math-and-science-in-chatgpt * OpenAI introduces the IH-Challenge to train frontier LLMs on prioritizing trusted instructions and resisting prompt injection attacks. | https://openai.com/index/instruction-hierarchy-challenge
### Together AI * Together GPU Clusters now feature built-in autoscaling, observability, and self-healing capabilities for production-ready infrastructure. | https://www.together.ai/blog/new-in-together-gpu-clusters-autoscaling-observability-self-healing
---
## 中文
### Anthropic * Anthropic 将在悉尼开设其在亚太地区的第四个办事处。 | https://www.anthropic.com/news/sydney-fourth-office-asia-pacific
### Google AI * Google Sheets 中的 Gemini 已达到最先进性能，推出了用于创建和分析复杂数据的新测试版功能。 | https://blog.google/products-and-platforms/products/workspace/gemini-google-sheets-state-of-the-art/
### Hugging Face * Hugging Face 在 Hub 上推出了存储桶功能，帮助开发者更高效地管理大型数据集和模型。 | https://huggingface.co/blog/storage-buckets * 本文探讨了从 16 个开源强化学习库中获得的经验教训，以优化令牌使用。 | https://huggingface.co/blog/async-rl-training-landscape * Hugging Face 详细介绍了 NVIDIA 如何构建开放数据管道以加速 AI 模型训练。 | https://huggingface.co/blog/nvidia/open-data-for-ai
### OpenAI * ChatGPT 现在提供数学和科学的交互式可视化解释，帮助学生实时探索概念。 | https://openai.com/index/new-ways-to-learn-math-and-science-in-chatgpt * OpenAI 推出了 IH-Challenge，用于训练前沿大语言模型优先处理可信指令并抵抗提示注入攻击。 | https://openai.com/index/instruction-hierarchy-challenge
### Together AI * Together GPU 集群现在内置了自动扩展、可观测性和自愈功能，为生产级基础设施做好准备。 | https://www.together.ai/blog/new-in-together-gpu-clusters-autoscaling-observability-self-healing

item.title: Daily Digest / 日报摘要 (2026-03-09)
item.description:
# 2026-03-09
## English
### Hugging Face * Hugging Face introduces Ulysses Sequence Parallelism to enable training models with million-token contexts. | https://huggingface.co/blog/ulysses-sp * Hugging Face releases LeRobot v0.5.0, focusing on scaling every dimension of robotics. | https://huggingface.co/blog/lerobot-release-v050 * Hugging Face highlights IBM's Granite 4.0 1B Speech model, a compact and multilingual solution built for edge devices. | https://huggingface.co/blog/ibm-granite/granite-4-speech
### OpenAI * OpenAI is acquiring Promptfoo, an AI security platform designed to help enterprises identify and remediate vulnerabilities in AI systems. | https://openai.com/index/openai-to-acquire-promptfoo
## 中文
### Hugging Face * Hugging Face 介绍了 Ulysses 序列并行化，以支持百万 token 上下文的模型训练。 | https://huggingface.co/blog/ulysses-sp * Hugging Face 发布了 LeRobot v0.5.0，专注于扩展机器人的各个维度。 | https://huggingface.co/blog/lerobot-release-v050 * Hugging Face 介绍了 IBM 的 Granite 4.0 1B 语音模型，这是一个紧凑、多语言且专为边缘设备设计的解决方案。 | https://huggingface.co/blog/ibm-granite/granite-4-speech
### OpenAI * OpenAI 正在收购 Promptfoo，这是一款帮助企业在开发过程中识别和修复 AI 系统漏洞的 AI 安全平台。 | https://openai.com/index/openai-to-acquire-promptfoo

item.description:
## English ### Anthropic (Newsroom) - [Where things stand with the Department of War](https://www.anthropic.com/news/where-stand-department-war) (2026-03-05 00:00) - A statement from Dario Amodei.
### Google AI Blog - [The latest AI news we announced in February](https://blog.google/innovation-and-ai/products/google-ai-updates-february-2026/) (2026-03-05 16:30) - an MP4 of a carousel with images reading "Gemini 3.1 Pro" and "Nano Banana 2" - [Ask a Techspert: How does AI understand my visual searches?](https://blog.google/company-news/inside-google/googlers/how-google-ai-visual-search-works/) (2026-03-05 18:00) - Mobile phone with a search bar that says "Ask anything"
### Hugging Face Blog - [Introducing Modular Diffusers - Composable Building Blocks for Diffusion Pipelines](https://huggingface.co/blog/modular-diffusers) (2026-03-05 00:00) - [Bringing Robotics AI to Embedded Platforms: Dataset Recording, VLA Fine‑Tuning, and On‑Device Optimizations](https://huggingface.co/blog/nxp/bringing-robotics-ai-to-embedded-platforms) (2026-03-05 14:16)
### OpenAI - [Introducing ChatGPT for Excel and new financial data integrations](https://openai.com/index/chatgpt-for-excel) (2026-03-05 00:00) - OpenAI introduces ChatGPT for Excel and new financial app integrations, powered by GPT-5.4 to accelerate modeling, research, and analysis in regulated environments. - [Introducing the Adoption news channel](https://openai.com/index/introducing-the-adoption-news-channel) (2026-03-05 00:00) - Practical insights and frameworks to turn AI progress into business advantage - [The five AI value models driving business reinvention](https://openai.com/index/the-five-ai-value-models-driving-business-reinvention) (2026-03-05 00:00) - Five AI value models show how leaders can sequence AI from workforce fluency to process reinvention and build durable business advantage. - [Ensuring AI use in education leads to opportunity](https://openai.com/index/ai-education-opportunity) (2026-03-05 09:00) - OpenAI shares new tools, certifications, and measurement resources to help schools and universities close AI capability gaps and expand opportunity. - [Introducing GPT-5.4](https://openai.com/index/introducing-gpt-5-4) (2026-03-05 10:00) - Introducing GPT-5.4, OpenAI’s most most capable and efficient frontier model for professional work, with state-of-the-art coding, computer use, tool search, and 1M-token context. - [Reasoning models struggle to control their chains of thought, and that’s good](https://openai.com/index/reasoning-models-chain-of-thought-controllability) (2026-03-05 10:00) - OpenAI introduces CoT-Control and finds reasoning models struggle to control their chains of thought, reinforcing monitorability as an AI safety safeguard. - [GPT-5.4 Thinking System Card](https://openai.com/index/gpt-5-4-thinking-system-card) (2026-03-05 10:00)
### Together AI Blog - [Key research and product announcements at the AI Native Conf](https://www.together.ai/blog/ai-native-conf-research-and-product-announcements) (2026-03-05 00:00) - At AI Native Conf, Together AI announced breakthroughs across kernels, RL, and inference optimization — including FlashAttention-4, ThunderAgent, and together.compile. Research that ships to production. That's the AI Native Cloud. - [FlashAttention-4: Algorithm and Kernel Pipelining Co-Design for Asymmetric Hardware Scaling](https://www.together.ai/blog/flashattention-4) (2026-03-05 00:00) - As GPU throughput outpaces memory bandwidth, kernels must evolve. item.title: Daily Digest / 日报摘要 (2026-03-04)
item.description:
## English
### Google Google introduces Canvas in AI Mode, now available to everyone in the U.S., to help draft documents and build interactive tools directly in Search. [Source Link](https://blog.google/products-and-platforms/products/search/ai-mode-canvas-writing-coding/)
### MiniMax MiniMax releases Music 2.5+, a model designed to unlock pure music capabilities and break through style boundaries. [Source Link](https://www.minimaxi.com/news/music-25-解锁纯音乐突破风格边界)
### OpenAI OpenAI introduces the Learning Outcomes Measurement Suite to assess AI's impact on student learning across diverse educational environments over time. [Source Link](https://openai.com/index/understanding-ai-and-learning-outcomes)
OpenAI shares how Axios uses AI to support local reporters, streamline workflows, and deliver high-impact local journalism at scale. [Source Link](https://openai.com/index/axios-allison-murphy)
A new preprint details how GPT-5.2 Pro helps derive and verify nonzero graviton tree amplitudes in quantum gravity. [Source Link](https://openai.com/index/extending-single-minus-amplitudes-to-gravitons)
## 中文
### Google Google 推出 AI 模式中的 Canvas 功能，现已面向美国用户开放，帮助用户在搜索中直接起草文档和构建交互式工具。 [来源链接](https://blog.google/products-and-platforms/products/search/ai-mode-canvas-writing-coding/)
### MiniMax MiniMax 发布 Music 2.5+ 模型，旨在解锁纯音乐能力并突破风格边界。 [来源链接](https://www.minimaxi.com/news/music-25-解锁纯音乐突破风格边界)
### OpenAI OpenAI 推出学习成果测量套件，旨在评估 AI 在不同教育环境中对学生学习成果的长期影响。 [来源链接](https://openai.com/index/understanding-ai-and-learning-outcomes)
OpenAI 分享了 Axios 如何利用 AI 支持本地记者、简化新闻编辑室工作流程，并大规模交付高影响力的本地新闻。 [来源链接](https://openai.com/index/axios-allison-murphy)
一篇新的预印本展示了 GPT-5.2 Pro 如何帮助推导和验证量子引力中的非零引力子树振幅。 [来源链接](https://openai.com/index/extending-single-minus-amplitudes-to-gravitons)

item.title: Daily Digest / 日报摘要 (2026-02-27)
item.description:
## English ### Anthropic (Newsroom) - [Statement on the comments from Secretary of War Pete Hegseth](https://www.anthropic.com/news/statement-comments-secretary-war) (2026-02-27 00:00) - Anthropic's response to the Secretary of War and advice to customers.
### OpenAI - [An update on our mental health-related work](https://openai.com/index/update-on-mental-health-related-work) (2026-02-27 00:00) - OpenAI shares updates on its mental health safety work, including parental controls, trusted contacts, improved distress detection, and recent litigation developments. - [Joint Statement from OpenAI and Microsoft](https://openai.com/index/continuing-microsoft-partnership) (2026-02-27 05:30) - Microsoft and OpenAI continue to work closely across research, engineering, and product development, building on years of deep collaboration and shared success. - [Introducing the Stateful Runtime Environment for Agents in Amazon Bedrock](https://openai.com/index/introducing-the-stateful-runtime-environment-for-agents-in-amazon-bedrock) (2026-02-27 05:30) - Stateful Runtime for Agents in Amazon Bedrock brings persistent orchestration, memory, and secure execution to multi-step AI workflows powered by OpenAI. - [Scaling AI for everyone](https://openai.com/index/scaling-ai-for-everyone) (2026-02-27 05:30) - Today we’re announcing $110B in new investment at a $730B pre money valuation. This includes $30B from SoftBank, $30B from NVIDIA, and $50B from Amazon. - [OpenAI and Amazon announce strategic partnership](https://openai.com/index/amazon-partnership) (2026-02-27 05:30) - OpenAI and Amazon announce a strategic partnership bringing OpenAI’s Frontier platform to AWS, expanding AI infrastructure, custom models, and enterprise AI agents.
## 中文 ### Anthropic (Newsroom) - [Statement on the comments from Secretary of War Pete Hegseth](https://www.anthropic.com/news/statement-comments-secretary-war) (2026-02-27 00:00) - Anthropic's response to the Secretary of War and advice to customers.

item.title: Daily Digest / 日报摘要 (2026-02-25)
item.description:
## English
### Anthropic (Newsroom) Anthropic acquires Vercept to advance Claude's computer use capabilities. | https://www.anthropic.com/news/acquires-vercept
### Google AI Blog Google introduces Circle to Search with AI tools like an "AI Overview" for outfit breakdowns and a virtual "Try it on" feature. | https://blog.google/products-and-platforms/products/search/circle-to-search-february-2026/ Google enhances Android on the Samsung Galaxy S26 with improved image recognition and search capabilities. | https://blog.google/products-and-platforms/platforms/android/samsung-unpacked-2026/
### OpenAI OpenAI releases a threat report examining how malicious actors combine AI models with websites and social platforms. | https://openai.com/index/disrupting-malicious-ai-uses
### Together AI Blog Together AI releases CoderForge-Preview, a 161K open dataset for training efficient coding agents. | https://www.together.ai/blog/coderforge-preview
## 中文
### Anthropic (Newsroom) Anthropic 收购 Vercept 以提升 Claude 的计算机使用能力。 | https://www.anthropic.com/news/acquires-vercept
### Google AI Blog Google 推出 Circle to Search，包含 AI 概览和虚拟试穿功能。 | https://blog.google/products-and-platforms/products/search/circle-to-search-february-2026/ Google 在三星 Galaxy S26 上增强了 Android 的智能功能。 | https://blog.google/products-and-platforms/platforms/android/samsung-unpacked-2026/
### OpenAI OpenAI 发布威胁报告，分析恶意行为者如何结合 AI 模型与网站及社交平台。 | https://openai.com/index/disrupting-malicious-ai-uses
### Together AI Blog Together AI 发布 CoderForge-Preview，这是一个用于训练高效编码代理的 161K 开放数据集。 | https://www.together.ai/blog/coderforge-preview

item.title: Daily Digest / 日报摘要 (2026-02-24)
item.description:
## English
### Anthropic Anthropic has released its Responsible Scaling Policy: Version 3.0, outlining updated safety measures for advanced AI systems. | https://www.anthropic.com/news/responsible-scaling-policy-v3
### Hugging Face Hugging Face details how to deploy open-source Vision Language Models (VLMs) on NVIDIA Jetson devices for edge computing. | https://huggingface.co/blog/nvidia/cosmos-on-jetson
### OpenAI OpenAI has appointed Arvind KC as Chief People Officer to help scale the company and strengthen its culture in the age of AI. | https://openai.com/index/arvind-kc-chief-people-officer
## 中文
### Anthropic Anthropic 发布了《负责任扩展政策》3.0 版本，概述了针对先进 AI 系统的更新安全措施。 | https://www.anthropic.com/news/responsible-scaling-policy-v3
### Hugging Face Hugging Face 详述了如何在 NVIDIA Jetson 设备上部署开源视觉语言模型 (VLM) 以进行边缘计算。 | https://huggingface.co/blog/nvidia/cosmos-on-jetson
### OpenAI OpenAI 任命 Arvind KC 为首席人事官，以帮助公司扩大规模并加强 AI 时代的企业文化。 | https://openai.com/index/arvind-kc-chief-people-officer

item.title: Daily Digest / 日报摘要 (2026-02-23)
item.description:
## English
### Anthropic Anthropic details methods to detect and prevent distillation attacks on its AI models. | https://www.anthropic.com/news/detecting-and-preventing-distillation-attacks
### OpenAI OpenAI introduces the Frontier Alliance Partners program to help enterprises scale secure AI agents. | https://openai.com/index/frontier-alliance-partners
### OpenAI OpenAI stops using SWE-bench Verified due to test contamination and training leakage, recommending SWE-bench Pro instead. | https://openai.com/index/why-we-no-longer-evaluate-swe-bench-verified
### Together AI Together AI research reveals that state-of-the-art speech models fail 39% of the time on street names despite high benchmark scores. | https://www.together.ai/blog/how-speech-models-fail
## 中文
### Anthropic Anthropic 介绍了检测和防止蒸馏攻击的方法。 | https://www.anthropic.com/news/detecting-and-preventing-distillation-attacks
### OpenAI OpenAI 宣布推出 Frontier Alliance Partners，帮助企业从 AI 原型转向安全、可扩展的代理部署。 | https://openai.com/index/frontier-alliance-partners
### OpenAI OpenAI 停止评估 SWE-bench Verified，指出该数据集存在测试污染和训练泄露问题，无法准确衡量代码进展，并推荐使用 SWE-bench Pro。 | https://openai.com/index/why-we-no-longer-evaluate-swe-bench-verified
### Together AI Together AI 的新研究显示，尽管 Whisper 和 Deepgram 等顶尖语音模型在基准测试中得分接近人类，但在路名识别上仍有 39% 的失败率。 | https://www.together.ai/blog/how-speech-models-fail

item.title: Daily Digest / 日报摘要 (2026-02-20)
item.description:
## English
### Anthropic Anthropic is making frontier cybersecurity capabilities available to defenders. [Link](https://www.anthropic.com/news/claude-code-security)
### Hugging Face GGML and llama.cpp have joined Hugging Face to ensure the long-term progress of Local AI. [Link](https://huggingface.co/blog/ggml-joins-hf)
### Hugging Face Users can now train AI models for free using Unsloth and Hugging Face Jobs. [Link](https://huggingface.co/blog/unsloth-jobs)
### OpenAI OpenAI shared its AI model's proof attempts for the First Proof math challenge to test research-grade reasoning. [Link](https://openai.com/index/first-proof-submissions)
## 中文
### Anthropic Anthropic 正在向防御者提供前沿网络安全能力。 [链接](https://www.anthropic.com/news/claude-code-security)
### Hugging Face GGML 和 llama.cpp 已加入 Hugging Face，以确保本地 AI 的长期进步。 [链接](https://huggingface.co/blog/ggml-joins-hf)
### Hugging Face 用户现在可以使用 Unsloth 和 Hugging Face Jobs 免费训练 AI 模型。 [链接](https://huggingface.co/blog/unsloth-jobs)
### OpenAI OpenAI 分享了其 AI 模型在 First Proof 数学挑战中的证明尝试，以测试研究级推理能力。 [链接](https://openai.com/index/first-proof-submissions)

item.title: Daily Digest / 日报摘要 (2026-02-19)
item.description:
## English
### Google AI Blog Sundar Pichai shares his vision for AI, highlighting a stylized design for "भारत 2026 INDIA" at the AI Impact Summit. [Link](https://blog.google/company-news/inside-google/message-ceo/sundar-pichai-ai-impact-summit-2026/) Google outlines the partnerships and investments announced during the AI Impact Summit 2026. [Link](https://blog.google/innovation-and-ai/technology/ai/ai-impact-summit-2026-collection/)
### Google DeepMind Google DeepMind introduces Gemini 3.1 Pro, a smarter model designed for complex tasks requiring more than simple answers. [Link](https://deepmind.google/blog/gemini-3-1-pro-a-smarter-model-for-your-most-complex-tasks/)
### Hugging Face Hugging Face explores how synthetic personas are helping Japanese AI development overcome data scarcity. [Link](https://huggingface.co/blog/nvidia/nemotron-personas-japan-nttdata-ja)
### OpenAI OpenAI commits $7.5 million to The Alignment Project to fund independent research on AI safety and security risks. [Link](https://openai.com/index/advancing-independent-research-ai-alignment)
### Together AI Together AI introduces Consistency Diffusion Language Models (CDLM), offering up to 14.5x faster inference without quality loss. [Link](https://www.together.ai/blog/consistency-diffusion-language-models)
***
## 中文
### Google AI Blog Sundar Pichai 分享了他对 AI 的愿景，强调了在 AI 影响峰会上展示的“भारत 2026 INDIA”主题设计。 [Link](https://blog.google/company-news/inside-google/message-ceo/sundar-pichai-ai-impact-summit-2026/) Google 介绍了在 AI 影响峰会上宣布的合作伙伴关系和投资。 [Link](https://blog.google/innovation-and-ai/technology/ai/ai-impact-summit-2026-collection/)
### Google DeepMind Google DeepMind 推出了 Gemini 3.1 Pro，这是一个专为需要超越简单答案的复杂任务设计的更智能模型。 [Link](https://deepmind.google/blog/gemini-3-1-pro-a-smarter-model-for-your-most-complex-tasks/)
### Hugging Face Hugging Face 探讨了合成人物角色如何帮助日本 AI 开发克服数据稀缺问题。 [Link](https://huggingface.co/blog/nvidia/nemotron-personas-japan-nttdata-ja)
### OpenAI OpenAI 承诺向 The Alignment Project 捐赠 750 万美元，以资助独立的 AI 对齐研究，加强全球 AGI 安全工作。 [Link](https://openai.com/index/advancing-independent-research-ai-alignment)
### Together AI Together AI 推出了一致性扩散语言模型 (CDLM)，在不牺牲质量的情况下提供高达 14.5 倍的推理加速。 [Link](https://www.together.ai/blog/consistency-diffusion-language-models)

item.title: Daily Digest / 日报摘要 (2026-02-18)
item.description:
## English
### Google * Google is hosting the AI Impact Summit 2026 in India to discuss partnerships for inclusive AI. | https://blog.google/innovation-and-ai/technology/ai/ai-impact-summit-2026-india/ * The Gemini app now features the Lyria 3 music generation model, allowing users to create 30-second tracks via text or images. | https://blog.google/innovation-and-ai/products/gemini-app/lyria-3/
### Google DeepMind * Google DeepMind details the integration of Lyria 3 into the Gemini app, enabling text-to-music and image-to-music generation. | https://deepmind.google/blog/a-new-way-to-express-yourself-gemini-can-now-create-music/
### Hugging Face * Hugging Face introduces a new feature in Gradio that allows users to build web apps with a single HTML snippet. | https://huggingface.co/blog/gradio-html-one-shot-apps * Hugging Face shares research from IBM and UC Berkeley on evaluating enterprise AI agents using IT-Bench and MAST. | https://huggingface.co/blog/ibm-research/itbenchandmast
### OpenAI * OpenAI for India expands AI access across the country by building local infrastructure, powering enterprises, and advancing workforce skills. | https://openai.com/index/openai-for-india
## 中文
### Google * Google将在印度举办AI影响峰会2026，讨论如何通过合作让AI造福所有人。 | https://blog.google/innovation-and-ai/technology/ai/ai-impact-summit-2026-india/ * Gemini应用现在集成了Lyria 3音乐生成模型，用户可以通过文本或图片创建30秒的音轨。 | https://blog.google/innovation-and-ai/products/gemini-app/lyria-3/
### Google DeepMind * Google DeepMind详细介绍了Lyria 3与Gemini应用的集成，支持文本和图像生成音乐。 | https://deepmind.google/blog/a-new-way-to-express-yourself-gemini-can-now-create-music/
### Hugging Face * Hugging Face在Gradio中引入了新功能，允许用户仅通过一个HTML片段即可构建Web应用。 | https://huggingface.co/blog/gradio-html-one-shot-apps * Hugging Face分享了IBM和加州大学伯克利分校的研究，探讨如何使用IT-Bench和MAST评估企业智能体的失败原因。 | https://huggingface.co/blog/ibm-research/itbenchandmast
### OpenAI * OpenAI for India通过建设本地基础设施、赋能企业以及提升劳动力技能，扩大了AI在印度的普及范围。 | https://openai.com/index/openai-for-india

item.title: Daily Digest / 日报摘要 (2026-02-17)
item.description:
## English
### Anthropic * **Anthropic** released Claude Sonnet 4.6, which delivers frontier performance across coding, agents, and professional work at scale. [Link](https://www.anthropic.com/news/claude-sonnet-4-6) * **Anthropic** signed an MOU with the Government of Rwanda to advance AI in health and education. [Link](https://www.anthropic.com/news/anthropic-rwanda-mou) * **Anthropic** is collaborating with Infosys to build AI agents for telecommunications and other regulated industries. [Link](https://www.anthropic.com/news/anthropic-infosys)
### Google AI * **Google AI** published its 2026 Responsible AI Progress Report, detailing ongoing efforts in safety and ethics. [Link](https://blog.google/innovation-and-ai/products/responsible-ai-2026-report-ongoing-work/)
### Hugging Face * **Hugging Face** highlighted the NVIDIA Nemotron 2 Nano 9B Japanese model, designed to support sovereign AI in Japan. [Link](https://huggingface.co/blog/nvidia/nemotron-nano-9b-v2-japanese-ja)
***
## 中文
### Anthropic * **Anthropic** 发布了 Claude Sonnet 4.6，在编码、智能体和专业工作的大规模应用中提供了前沿性能。 [链接](https://www.anthropic.com/news/claude-sonnet-4-6) * **Anthropic** 与卢旺达政府签署谅解备忘录，旨在推动健康和教育领域的 AI 发展。 [链接](https://www.anthropic.com/news/anthropic-rwanda-mou) * **Anthropic** 正与 Infosys 合作，为电信和其他受监管行业构建 AI 智能体。 [链接](https://www.anthropic.com/news/anthropic-infosys)
### Google AI * **Google AI** 发布了 2026 年负责任 AI 进展报告，概述了在安全和伦理方面的持续工作。 [链接](https://blog.google/innovation-and-ai/products/responsible-ai-2026-report-ongoing-work/)
### Hugging Face * **Hugging Face** 介绍了 NVIDIA Nemotron 2 Nano 9B 日语模型，该模型旨在支持日本的自主 AI。 [链接](https://huggingface.co/blog/nvidia/nemotron-nano-9b-v2-japanese-ja)

item.title: Daily Digest / 日报摘要 (2026-02-13)
item.description:
## English
### Anthropic * Anthropic partners with CodePath to bring Claude to the US’s largest collegiate computer science program. | https://www.anthropic.com/news/anthropic-codepath-partnership * Chris Liddell has been appointed to Anthropic’s board of directors. | https://www.anthropic.com/news/chris-liddell-appointed-anthropic-board
### Hugging Face * Hugging Face introduces custom CUDA kernels for Codex and Claude to enhance model performance. | https://huggingface.co/blog/custom-cuda-kernels-agent-skills
### OpenAI * OpenAI details a new real-time access system combining rate limits and credits to scale access to Codex and Sora. | https://openai.com/index/beyond-rate-limits * OpenAI released GABRIEL, an open-source toolkit that uses GPT to convert qualitative text and images into quantitative data for social science research. | https://openai.com/index/scaling-social-science-research * OpenAI introduces Lockdown Mode and Elevated Risk labels in ChatGPT to help organizations defend against prompt injection and data exfiltration. | https://openai.com/index/introducing-lockdown-mode-and-elevated-risk-labels-in-chatgpt * GPT-5.2 proposed a new formula for a gluon amplitude in theoretical physics, which was later formally proved by OpenAI and collaborators. | https://openai.com/index/new-result-theoretical-physics
***
## 中文
### Anthropic * Anthropic 与 CodePath 合作，将 Claude 引入美国最大的大学计算机科学项目。 | https://www.anthropic.com/news/anthropic-codepath-partnership * Chris Liddell 被任命为 Anthropic 董事会成员。 | https://www.anthropic.com/news/chris-liddell-appointed-anthropic-board
### Hugging Face * Hugging Face 推出了适用于 Codex 和 Claude 的自定义 CUDA 内核。 | https://huggingface.co/blog/custom-cuda-kernels-agent-skills
### OpenAI * OpenAI 介绍了结合速率限制和信用额度的实时访问系统，以扩展对 Codex 和 Sora 的访问。 | https://openai.com/index/beyond-rate-limits * OpenAI 发布了 GABRIEL 开源工具包，利用 GPT 将定性文本和图像转化为定量数据，以辅助社会科学研究。 | https://openai.com/index/scaling-social-science-research * OpenAI 在 ChatGPT 中引入了“锁定模式”和“高风险”标签，以帮助组织防御提示注入和数据泄露。 | https://openai.com/index/introducing-lockdown-mode-and-elevated-risk-labels-in-chatgpt * GPT-5.2 在理论物理学中提出了一个新的胶子振幅公式，该公式随后被 OpenAI 和合作者正式证明。 | https://openai.com/index/new-result-theoretical-physics

item.title: Daily Digest / 日报摘要 (2026-02-12)
item.description:
## English
### Anthropic * Anthropic raises $30 billion in Series G funding led by GIC and Coatue, valuing the company at $380 billion post-money. | https://www.anthropic.com/news/anthropic-raises-30-billion-series-g-funding-380-billion-post-money-valuation * Anthropic is donating $20 million to Public First Action to support public policy initiatives. | https://www.anthropic.com/news/donate-public-first-action
### Google AI * Google AI introduces Gemini 3 Deep Think, a specialized reasoning mode designed to solve modern science, research, and engineering challenges. | https://blog.google/innovation-and-ai/models-and-research/gemini-models/gemini-3-deep-think/
### Google DeepMind * Google DeepMind updates its most specialized reasoning mode to tackle complex problems in science, research, and engineering. | https://deepmind.google/blog/gemini-3-deep-think-advancing-science-research-and-engineering/
### Hugging Face * Hugging Face shares insights on evaluating tool-using agents in real-world environments with OpenEnv. | https://huggingface.co/blog/openenv-turing
### OpenAI * OpenAI introduces GPT-5.3-Codex-Spark, a real-time coding model offering 15x faster generation and 128k context. | https://openai.com/index/introducing-gpt-5.3-codex-spark
### Together AI * Together AI launches Dedicated Container Inference, a production-grade orchestration tool that delivers up to 2.6x faster inference for custom AI models. | https://www.together.ai/blog/dedicated-container-inference
## 中文
### Anthropic * Anthropic 完成由 GIC 和 Coatue 领投的 300 亿美元 G 轮融资，投后估值达 3800 亿美元。 | https://www.anthropic.com/news/anthropic-raises-30-billion-series-g-funding-380-billion-post-money-valuation * Anthropic 向 Public First Action 捐赠 2000 万美元，以支持公共政策倡议。 | https://www.anthropic.com/news/donate-public-first-action
### Google AI * Google AI 推出 Gemini 3 Deep Think，这是一种专门化的推理模式，旨在解决现代科学、研究和工程挑战。 | https://blog.google/innovation-and-ai/models-and-research/gemini-models/gemini-3-deep-think/
### Google DeepMind * Google DeepMind 更新了其最专业的推理模式，以应对科学、研究和工程领域的复杂问题。 | https://deepmind.google/blog/gemini-3-deep-think-advancing-science-research-and-engineering/
### Hugging Face * Hugging Face 分享了关于在现实环境中评估工具使用代理的见解。 | https://huggingface.co/blog/openenv-turing
### OpenAI * OpenAI 推出 GPT-5.3-Codex-Spark，这是一种实时编码模型，提供 15 倍更快的生成速度和 128k 上下文。 | https://openai.com/index/introducing-gpt-5.3-codex-spark
### Together AI * Together AI 推出 Dedicated Container Inference，这是一种生产级编排工具，可为自定义 AI 模型提供高达 2.6 倍的推理加速。 | https://www.together.ai/blog/dedicated-container-inference

item.title: Daily Digest / 日报摘要 (2026-02-11)
item.description:
## 2026-02-11
### English
* **Anthropic** Anthropic discusses the impact of rising electricity prices on its data centers and how they are managing these costs. [Link](https://www.anthropic.com/news/covering-electricity-price-increases) * **OpenAI** OpenAI explores "harness engineering" to leverage Codex within an agent-first architecture. [Link](https://openai.com/index/harness-engineering) * **Together AI** Together AI introduces a Cache-aware Prefill-Decode (CPD) architecture that improves long-context LLM serving speed by up to 40%. [Link](https://www.together.ai/blog/cache-aware-disaggregated-inference)
### 中文
* **Anthropic** Anthropic 讨论了数据中心电价上涨的影响以及如何管理这些成本。 [链接](https://www.anthropic.com/news/covering-electricity-price-increases) * **OpenAI** OpenAI 探索了“Harness 工程”，以便在以智能体优先的世界中利用 Codex。 [链接](https://openai.com/index/harness-engineering) * **Together AI** Together AI 介绍了一种缓存感知的预填充-解码（CPD）架构，可将长上下文 LLM 的服务速度提高 40%。 [链接](https://www.together.ai/blog/cache-aware-disaggregated-inference)

### Google * Google discusses efforts to help kids and teens learn and grow online on Safer Internet Day 2026. https://blog.google/innovation-and-ai/technology/safety-security/safer-internet-day-2026-kids-teens/ * Google shares nine fun questions to try asking Google Photos to get the most out of the Ask Photos feature. https://blog.google/products-and-platforms/products/photos/ask-button-ask-photos-tips/
## 中文

item.title: Daily Digest / 日报摘要 (2026-02-09)
item.description:
## English
### Hugging Face Hugging Face releases a preview of Transformers.js v4, now available on NPM for browser-based inference. | https://huggingface.co/blog/transformersjs-v4
### OpenAI OpenAI begins testing ads in ChatGPT to support free access, featuring clear labeling, answer independence, strong privacy protections, and user control. | https://openai.com/index/testing-ads-in-chatgpt
OpenAI for Government deploys a custom ChatGPT on GenAI.mil to provide secure, safety-forward AI solutions to U.S. defense teams. | https://openai.com/index/bringing-chatgpt-to-genaimil
## 中文
### Hugging Face Hugging Face 发布了 Transformers.js v4 预览版，现已可在 NPM 上使用，支持浏览器端推理。 | https://huggingface.co/blog/transformersjs-v4
### OpenAI OpenAI 开始在 ChatGPT 中测试广告以支持免费访问，包含清晰的标签、答案独立性、强大的隐私保护和用户控制。 | https://openai.com/index/testing-ads-in-chatgpt
OpenAI for Government 在 GenAI.mil 上部署了定制版 ChatGPT，为美国国防团队提供安全、以安全为先的 AI 解决方案。 | https://openai.com/index/bringing-chatgpt-to-genaimil

item.title: Daily Digest / 日报摘要 (2026-02-06)
item.description:
## English
### OpenAI * OpenAI has updated its privacy policy specifically for Korea to comply with local regulations. | [https://openai.com/policies/kr-privacy-policy](https://openai.com/policies/kr-privacy-policy) * OpenAI outlines its localization strategy, explaining how frontier models can be adapted to local languages and laws while maintaining safety. | [https://openai.com/index/our-approach-to-localization](https://openai.com/index/our-approach-to-localization)
### Together AI * New research investigates what LLMs generate when not given specific instructions, revealing distinct "knowledge priors" across different model families like GPT, Llama, and DeepSeek. | [https://www.together.ai/blog/what-llms-think](https://www.together.ai/blog/what-llms-think)
## 中文
### OpenAI * OpenAI 更新了韩国隐私政策，以符合当地法规。 | [https://openai.com/policies/kr-privacy-policy](https://openai.com/policies/kr-privacy-policy) * OpenAI 分享了其本地化策略，解释了如何在不牺牲安全性的前提下，将前沿模型适配到当地语言、法律和文化中。 | [https://openai.com/index/our-approach-to-localization](https://openai.com/index/our-approach-to-localization)
### Together AI * 新研究调查了当未给出具体指令时大语言模型会生成什么，揭示了 GPT、Llama、DeepSeek 等不同模型家族之间独特的“知识先验”。 | [https://www.together.ai/blog/what-llms-think](https://www.together.ai/blog/what-llms-think)

item.title: Daily Digest / 日报摘要 (2026-02-05)
item.description:
## English ### Anthropic (Newsroom) - [Introducing Claude Opus 4.6](https://www.anthropic.com/news/claude-opus-4-6) (2026-02-05 00:00) - We’re upgrading our smartest model. Across agentic coding, computer use, tool use, search, and finance, Opus 4.6 is an industry-leading model, often by wide margin.
### Google AI Blog - [Watch our new Gemini ad ahead of football’s biggest weekend](https://blog.google/company-news/inside-google/company-announcements/gemini-ad-new-home/) (2026-02-05 14:30) - A toddler in a blue and yellow striped shirt sits on a kitchen counter eating a red apple. Text in the corner reads: 'New Home, Google Gemini SB Commercial’ - [How Google Cloud is helping Team USA elevate their tricks with AI](https://blog.google/innovation-and-ai/infrastructure-and-cloud/google-cloud/us-ski-snowboard-tool-winter-olympics-2026/) (2026-02-05 16:00) - A woman outdoors in the snow looks at a tablet. A half pipe is behind her. - [Natively Adaptive Interfaces: A new framework for AI accessibility](https://blog.google/company-news/outreach-and-initiatives/accessibility/natively-adaptive-interfaces-ai-accessibility/) (2026-02-05 17:00) - A collage of four images, the first of a woman with curly hair in front of a silver laptop, the second of the same woman and a man with short black hair speaking on a stairwell, the third of a the same man with glasses, and an aerial ima...
### Hugging Face Blog - [Introducing SyGra Studio](https://huggingface.co/blog/ServiceNow-AI/sygra-studio) (2026-02-05 16:52)
### OpenAI - [Navigating health questions with ChatGPT](https://openai.com/index/navigating-health-questions) (2026-02-05 00:00) - A family shares how ChatGPT helped them prepare for critical cancer treatment decisions for their son alongside expert guidance from his doctors. - [GPT-5.3-Codex System Card](https://openai.com/index/gpt-5-3-codex-system-card) (2026-02-05 00:00) - GPT‑5.3-Codex is the most capable agentic coding model to date, combining the frontier coding performance of GPT‑5.2-Codex with the reasoning and professional knowledge capabilities of GPT‑5.2. - [Introducing GPT-5.3-Codex](https://openai.com/index/introducing-gpt-5-3-codex) (2026-02-05 00:00) - GPT-5.3-Codex is a Codex-native agent that pairs frontier coding performance with general reasoning to support long-horizon, real-world technical work. - [Introducing OpenAI Frontier](https://openai.com/index/introducing-openai-frontier) (2026-02-05 06:00) - OpenAI Frontier is an enterprise platform for building, deploying, and managing AI agents with shared context, onboarding, permissions, and governance. - [Introducing Trusted Access for Cyber](https://openai.com/index/trusted-access-for-cyber) (2026-02-05 10:00) - OpenAI introduces Trusted Access for Cyber, a trust-based framework that expands access to frontier cyber capabilities while strengthening safeguards against misuse. - [GPT-5 lowers the cost of cell-free protein synthesis](https://openai.com/index/gpt-5-lowers-protein-synthesis-cost) (2026-02-05 11:00) - An autonomous lab combining OpenAI’s GPT-5 with Ginkgo Bioworks’ cloud automation cut cell-free protein synthesis costs by 40% through closed-loop experimentation.
## 中文 ### Anthropic (Newsroom) - [Introducing Claude Opus 4.6](https://www.anthropic.com/news/claude-opus-4-6) (2026-02-05 00:00) - We’re upgrading our smartest model. Across agentic coding, computer use, tool use, search, and finance, Opus 4.6 is an industry-leading model, often by wide margin.

A half pipe is behind her. - [Natively Adaptive Interfaces: A new framework for AI accessibility](https://blog.google/company-news/outreach-and-initiatives/accessibility/natively-adaptive-interfaces-ai-accessibility/) (2026-02-05 17:00) - A collage of four images, the first of a woman with curly hair in front of a silver laptop, the second of the same woman and a man with short black hair speaking on a stairwell, the third of a the same man with glasses, and an aerial ima...
### Hugging Face Blog - [Introducing SyGra Studio](https://huggingface.co/blog/ServiceNow-AI/sygra-studio) (2026-02-05 16:52)
